AuthSignIn.title: Sign in
AuthSignIn.description: Welcome back. Please enter your credentials.
AuthSignIn.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

AuthRegister.title: Create account
AuthRegister.description: Enter your details to register for the platform.
AuthRegister.signupDisabled: Self-service registration is disabled. Please contact an administrator.

CmsHome.emptyDescription: Your CMS homepage is set but it does not have any content blocks yet. Start building in the admin panel to replace this placeholder with your custom layout.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: We couldn't find the page you were looking for.
NotFound.frontendDescription: We couldn't find what you're looking for.

Hero.titleStart: A modern storefront that feels tailored
Hero.description: Highlight your best products, give every collection a story, and keep the look aligned with your CMS theme without extra layout work.
Hero.setupStepOne: Upload your logo and brand colors.
Hero.featuredStackDescription: Use the CMS appearance controls to keep each section consistent, then spotlight the products that deserve attention.
Hero.focusTitle: Design for discovery, then let the catalog do the rest.
Hero.focusDescription: Pair editorial sections with product cards to guide visitors toward what you want to sell most.

Signature.title: Bring a sense of direction to every collection.
Signature.description: Use this editorial band to spotlight new releases, seasonal edits, or staff picks. It keeps the focus tight while the catalog grows.
Signature.launchKitDescription: From brand setup to live link.

Highlights.title: Everything you need to make the homepage feel complete.
Highlights.description: The fallback layout balances storytelling with shopping, so you can launch while your CMS pages are still coming together.
Highlights.itemOneDescription: Blend storytelling and commerce with hero, highlights, and product grids.
Highlights.itemTwoDescription: Every section respects your CMS appearance palette and display modes.
Highlights.itemThreeDescription: Keep attention on the catalog with clean, image-led cards.

Collections.title: Build a narrative around your catalog.
Collections.description: Create small edits and spotlight them with scrollable cards.
Collections.seasonalEditDescription: A focused set of seasonal picks.
Collections.essentialsDescription: Core items that anchor the catalog.

Products.title: Featured catalog
Products.description: Keep your best items front and center with a clean, image-first grid.
Products.emptyDescription: Your products will appear here once you add them in the admin panel. Start by creating a few featured items and uploading imagery.

NextSteps.title: Want a fully custom homepage?
NextSteps.description: Build a CMS landing page and swap this fallback for bespoke layouts whenever you are ready.

Footer.description: Curated commerce powered by your CMS appearance settings.

Product.noDescription: No description available yet. Add details in the admin panel to make this product stand out.
Product.themeAlignedDescription: Built to match your CMS appearance settings.
Product.catalogReadyDescription: Showcase tags, categories, and inventory status.
Product.confidentDisplayDescription: Highlight pricing, specs, and availability at a glance.

home.label: Start screen
home.description: Choose how to practise and start the next session.

training.label: Training setup

kangur.label: Mathematical Kangaroo session
kangur.description: Solve Mathematical Kangaroo tasks step by step.

calendar_quiz.label: Calendar practice
calendar_quiz.description: Practise reading dates and calendar relationships.

logical_patterns_quiz.label: Patterns quiz
logical_patterns_quiz.description: Complete patterns and sequences in a quick quiz.

logical_classification_quiz.label: Classification quiz
logical_classification_quiz.description: Sort items and find shared traits.

logical_analogies_quiz.label: Analogies quiz
logical_analogies_quiz.description: Practise analogies and relationships in quick rounds.

english_sentence_quiz.label: Sentence structure quiz
english_sentence_quiz.description: Practise sentence order, questions, and conjunctions in English.

english_parts_of_speech_quiz.label: Parts of speech quiz
english_parts_of_speech_quiz.description: Sort words by parts of speech in short rounds.

operation.label: Game type selection
operation.description: Choose the type of maths game and its difficulty level.

playing.label: Question to solve
playing.description: Solve the current question without hints and with a final answer ready.

result.label: Game result
result.description: Review the game result and decide what to practise next.

home.missingLearnerDescription: Add or choose a learner profile in the section below to see progress and today's missions.
home.priorityAssignmentsEmpty: No active assignments from the parent.

intro.maths: Choose a game type and jump straight into maths practice.
intro.alphabet: Choose a letter game and practise the alphabet.
intro.geometry: Choose a shapes game and practise geometry.
intro.language: Choose a language game type and jump straight into practice.

quickPractice.title: Quick practice
quickPractice.description: Quick quizzes based on lesson topics.

tabs.title: Dashboard tabs
tabs.description: Switch between scores, progress, assignments, monitoring, and AI Tutor settings.

unauthenticated.title: Parent / Teacher dashboard
unauthenticated.description: This view shows the learner's private progress, so it requires a parent account. If you do not have one yet, create it without leaving StudiQ.
unauthenticated.summarySuffix: If you do not have a parent account yet, create it without leaving StudiQ.

restricted.title: Parent dashboard
restricted.description: This view is available only for a parent account that manages learner profiles.
restricted.summarySuffix: This view is available only for a parent account that manages learner profiles.

hero.noLearnerDescription: Add or choose a learner profile in the section below to see progress and today's missions.

activity.offlineDescription: No current activity in the app.

page.sessionDescriptionAuthenticated: Parent dashboard with scores, learner progress, assignments, monitoring, and AI Tutor support.
page.sessionDescriptionRestricted: Restricted-access view of the parent dashboard.

assignments.title: Learner assignments
assignments.description: Set work priorities and review what is active or needs a reminder.

progress.title: Learner progress
progress.description: Review learning rhythm, current level, daily missions, and the main next focus.

dailyQuest.label: Daily mission
dailyQuest.description: This is the learner's current daily mission, synced with the game and profile views.

openedTasks.label: Opened tasks

assignments.loadError: We could not load active assignments.

lessonProgress.label: Lesson progress
lessonProgress.description: Lesson progress saved panel by panel.

monitoring.title: Assignment monitoring
monitoring.description: Monitor assigned work, including StudiQ suggestions, to keep a steady learning rhythm.

lessonPanelTime.label: Time in lesson panels
lessonPanelTime.description: Time spent in lesson panels during the latest session (counted only while the tab is active).

KangurUserAccess.checkAccessGranted: that an administrator has granted access to this account,
KangurUserAccess.checkSignInAgain: whether signing in again resolves the problem.

feedback.checkRemainder: Check how many items stay in the remainder.
feedback.equalGroups: Make sure every group has the same size.
feedback.correct: Nice work! The groups are even.
feedback.idle: Drag or click the items to split them into groups.

summary.perfect: Perfect! You really know the calendar!
summary.retry: Keep practising and you will master the calendar!

mixed.perfect: Perfect! You know the calendar inside out!
mixed.retry: Great! Keep practising the calendar challenges.

dni.perfect: Great! You recognise weekdays and weekends with confidence.
dni.retry: Practise weekday names and the weekend columns a bit more.

miesiace.perfect: Great! Months and seasons are nicely organised already.
miesiace.retry: Practise the order of the months and their seasons a bit more.

data.perfect: Great! You read calendar dates quickly and accurately.
data.retry: Practise finding specific dates on the calendar grid a bit more.

summary.sectionEncouragement: Don't give up. A few more attempts and this section will feel easier.

dni.guidance: You are practising weekday names and spotting weekends on the calendar layout.

miesiace.guidance: You are practising months, their order, and matching them to the correct season.

data.guidance: You are practising reading dates and finding a specific day on the calendar grid.
data.promptLabel: Find the correct date on the calendar

inRound.tryAgain: Oops, not that one. Try again!
inRound.confirmMonth: Click when you think you are on the correct month.
inRound.chooseSeason: Drag or choose the correct season below.

tasks.clickDate: Click the date in the calendar that falls on {weekdayName}
tasks.dragSeason: Drag the month "{monthName}" to the correct season

summary.perfect: Perfect! You spot patterns in a flash.
summary.good: Great! Patterns and sequences are getting easier.
summary.retry: Good try! Review the rule and try again.

summary.perfect: Perfect! You recognise relationships in every context.
summary.good: Great! You have an eye for relationships.
summary.retry: Good try! Compare the differences and try again.

summary.perfect: Perfect! You classify really well.
summary.good: Great! You spot groups and odd ones out quickly.
summary.retry: Good try! A few more rounds and it will click.

feedback.wrong: That is not the odd one out.

summary.perfect: Perfect! Pronouns on point.
summary.retry: One more round and it will feel easy.

summary.perfect: Perfect! Warm-up complete.
summary.retry: One more warm-up round and it will click.

summary.perfect: Perfect! Prepositions mastered.
summary.retry: One more round and check the clue in each sentence.

order.dragInstruction: Drag the words to arrange the sentence

time-start.prompt: Build a sentence about a time.
time-start.title: Time: start

time-quiz.prompt: Build a sentence about a day of the week.
time-quiz.title: Time: day

time-month.prompt: Build a sentence about a month.
time-month.title: Time: month

place-notes.prompt: Build a sentence about a surface.
place-notes.title: Place: surface

place-bus.prompt: Build a sentence about a point or location.

relation-between.prompt: Build a sentence about a relation between points.
relation-between.title: Relations: between

feedback.perfect: Perfect! Everything is in the right place.

time-sort.prompt: Drag the phrases to the correct time preposition.
time-sort.hint: Hours = at, days = on, months = in.
time-sort.title: Time sorting

place-sort.prompt: Drag the phrases to the correct place preposition.
place-sort.hint: Point = at, surface = on, inside = in.
place-sort.title: Place sorting

relations-sort.prompt: Drag the phrases to the correct spatial relation.
relations-sort.hint: between = between, above = above, below = below.
relations-sort.title: Relations sorting

summary.good: Good job, only a few details left.
summary.retry: Do one more round and improve the sentence order.

inRound.fillHelp: Type the missing word, then click "Check".

feedback.correct: Great! That is how this sentence is built.

svo-order.prompt: Choose the sentence in correct S + V + O order.
svo-order.hint: Subject first, then verb, then object.
svo-order.question: Which sentence is correct?

order-words.prompt: Drag the words to build a correct sentence.
order-words.hint: Start with the subject, then the verb, then the rest.
order-words.question: Arrange: My friend always finishes homework on time.

do-question.prompt: Complete the question with the correct word.
do-question.question: ___ you play football on Saturdays?

connector-so.prompt: Quick round — you only have a few seconds!
connector-so.question: I was late, ___ I texted my coach.

frequency-adverb.prompt: Choose the correct position for the adverb.
frequency-adverb.hint: Frequency adverbs come before the main verb.
frequency-adverb.question: She ___ checks her notes after class.

summary.perfect: Perfect agreement.
summary.retry: One more round and it will click.

streamer-goes.prompt: Click the verb that matches singular.

everyone-arrives.prompt: Everyone still takes a singular verb.

there-are.prompt: There is/are depends on the noun after it.

either-players.prompt: With either/or, the verb matches the nearer subject.

pair-is.prompt: The phrase "pair of" counts as singular.

feedback.roundPerfect: Perfect! Every word is in the right place.

summary.perfect: Perfect! You recognise parts of speech flawlessly.
summary.good: Great! You are very close to a perfect round.
summary.retry: Good job! Try once more and improve the score.

summary.perfect: Perfect! Your shapes look excellent.
summary.good: Great job! Your drawing keeps getting more precise.
summary.retry: Keep practising. Every next shape will be better.

summary.perfect: Perfect! You recognise geometry basics really well.
summary.good: Very good! Just a little more and it will be perfect.
summary.retry: Good try! Try again to reinforce the concepts.

inRound.missionTitle: Geo mission: point, segment, side, angle
inRound.instruction: Drag a label onto the marked spot or click a label and then the board.

feedback.correct: Great! That is the correct answer.

round-point.title: Point
round-point.prompt: Recognise a single place on the board.
round-point.hint: A point is one dot with no length or width.

round-segment.title: Segment
round-segment.prompt: Find the piece connecting two points.
round-segment.hint: A segment has a start and an end — two points.

round-side.title: Side
round-side.prompt: Find a side of the figure.
round-side.hint: A side is a segment belonging to a polygon.

round-angle.title: Angle
round-angle.prompt: Find the place where two segments meet.
round-angle.hint: An angle is the opening between two arms.

summary.perfect: Perfect! Perimeters mastered.

keyboard.cleared: The board was cleared and the cursor returned to the centre.

errors.tooShort: Draw the shape a little longer so it can be checked.

mixed.title: Mixed training
mixed.descriptionNeedsPractice: After the reviews, launch mixed training to check whether the skills transfer into practice.
mixed.descriptionDefault: Keep the learning rhythm with a shorter mixed training session covering several task types.
mixed.progressLabelEmpty: Daily rhythm: start with the first game

retain.title: {emoji} Keep the strong side sharp
retain.description: {title} is stable ({masteryPercent}%). A short review will help maintain the level.

starter.description: A gentle start with two categories helps build rhythm without overload in the first session.
starter.label: Start
starter.title: Recommended starter practice

weakestLesson.description: The weakest topic is {title} ({masteryPercent}%). One focused session will rebuild this area faster.
weakestLesson.label: Recover a lesson
weakestLesson.title: Recommended practice: {title}

topActivity.description: {activity} is currently worth about {averageXpPerSession} XP per game. It is the strongest candidate for the next session.
topActivity.label: Strong streak
topActivity.title: Recommended practice: {activity}

mixed.descriptionWithTrack: The {track} track is closest to the next badge. Mixed practice keeps progress moving across several categories at once.
mixed.descriptionDefault: Mixed practice keeps the rhythm going and helps collect more XP across several categories at once.
mixed.title: Recommended mixed practice

gentle.description: An easier training set is the safest way into Kangaroo mode without a sharp jump in difficulty.
gentle.label: Gentle start
gentle.title: We recommend starting with the 3-point training set

competitionReady.description: You have strong pace and high accuracy. The full competition test should deliver the best progress.
competitionReady.label: Competition ready
competitionReady.title: We recommend the full competition test

challenge.description: Your accuracy is already high. The 5-point set offers a better challenge and a stronger reward.
challenge.label: Challenge
challenge.title: We recommend the 5-point set

strongStep.description: A medium-difficulty set should improve the score without too abrupt a jump.
strongStep.label: Strong step
strongStep.title: We recommend the 4-point set

steadyStep.description: The 3-point set still gives a competition rhythm, but stays safer than the harder variants.
steadyStep.label: Steady step
steadyStep.title: We recommend the 3-point set

quest.titleCompleted: Today's mission is ready to claim
